name: Mega Polietilen Kopuk Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Mega Polietilen K√É¬∂p√É¬ºk Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells foam sheets in Turkey.
